experiment.design: One bounded talker producer thread per request with explicit packet credits. One next-frame credit is issued before synchronous codec decode and the remaining packet credits are issued after decode.

public_c_abi_runs.interpretation: The control B6 tail varied materially from the earlier qualifying baseline, so B6 delta alone is not sufficient promotion evidence. B1 throughput improved slightly, but B3 request RTF and B1/B3/B6 TTFA did not improve consistently.

natural_eos_run.text: Guten Morgen. Dies ist ein ruhiger Test der nativen, fortlaufenden Sprachausgabe.
natural_eos_run.instruction: A calm, relaxed adult male voice. Natural pace, low energy, clear articulation.
natural_eos_run.note: TTFA includes the C smoke harness's deliberate 300 ms undersized-buffer preflight pause.

decision.reason: The host-thread pipeline preserved exact audio and recovered most eager-producer TTFA, but the throughput improvement is too small and the concurrency TTFA tail is not consistently better.
decision.next_design: Expose the predictor-ready CUDA event and device frame-code buffer to the codec stream, then use cudaStreamWaitEvent so decoder work can overlap the following semantic-token computation without host-side speculative producers.
